title: Fix white screen on load

requirements.text: Fix the white screen on load issue. Audit App.tsx and all tool components for runtime errors that prevent the React app from mounting. Ensure all CDN library references (PDF.js, jsPDF, pdf-lib, Mammoth.js) are accessed safely with null/undefined guards before use, and wrap the app root in an error boundary so uncaught errors display a fallback UI instead of a blank screen.
acceptanceCriteria: The app renders its full UI (hero, tool grid, footer) on initial load with no white screen
No uncaught JavaScript errors appear in the browser console on load
CDN library globals (pdfjsLib, jspdf, PDFLib, mammoth) are checked for availability before use in tool components
If a runtime error does occur, an error boundary displays a readable fallback message instead of a blank screen
All 8 tool cards are visible and clickable after load

requirements.text: Audit index.html to ensure all CDN script tags load in the correct order and with appropriate attributes (e.g., defer or async where suitable). Verify that the PDF.js workerSrc global is set correctly after the PDF.js CDN script loads, and that all CDN URLs are valid and up-to-date.
acceptanceCriteria: All CDN scripts (PDF.js, jsPDF, pdf-lib, Mammoth.js) load without 404 or network errors
PDF.js workerSrc is set to a matching CDN URL for the same version as the main PDF.js script
The React bundle loads and executes after all CDN scripts are available
No 'is not defined' or 'Cannot read properties of undefined' errors related to CDN globals appear in the console

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not remove or replace any existing conversion tool logic; only add safety guards and fix initialization errors
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or theme
Migrating away from CDN-based libraries to npm packages
